---
title: "BCR Quarterly Infographic Brief"
---

```{r}
#| label: load-bcr-data

# Set default fallback parameters for running code interactively during
# development since Quarto params are only passed when rendering the document
if (
  !exists(
    "params"
  )
) {
  params <- list(
    report_date = "2026-01-01",
    fiscal_system = "state",
    period = "quarter",
    start_date = "2026-01-01",
    end_date = "2026-03-31",
    fiscal_period_start = "2026-01-01",
    fiscal_period_end = "2026-03-31"
   )
}

params$start_date <- lubridate::ymd(
  params$start_date
  )
params$end_date <- lubridate::ymd(
  params$end_date
  )
params$fiscal_period_start <- lubridate::ymd(
  params$fiscal_period_start
  )
params$fiscal_period_end <- lubridate::ymd(
  params$fiscal_period_end
  )


# Load ETL output
source(
  "R/load_data.R"
)

# Run the function to load BCR data
bcr_data <- load_bcr_data()
```

```{r}
#| label: filter-bcr-data

period <- reporting_period(
  date = params$report_date,
  system = params$fiscal_system,
  period = "quarter"
)

start_date <- period$start
end_date <- period$end

bcr_full_data <- bcr_data$bcr_full_data |>
  dplyr::filter(
    enrollment_starting_date >= start_date,
    enrollment_starting_date <= end_date
  )
```
